title: gnaphalium sylvaticum subsp. rectum
intro: Gnaphalium sylvaticum subsp. rectum, also known as the upright cudweed, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the upright cudweed are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
